title: Ad Spend Incrementality Lab
summary: Estimate true lift from spend changes and package clear incrementality reads for marketers.
knowledge_base: Ad Spend Incrementality Lab is positioned as a Marketing Science starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Estimate true lift from spend changes and package clear incrementality reads for marketers.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on incrementality, marketing, causal.

app_modules.hint: Opportunity score and top factors will appear here.
